phases.title: Arrays, Hashing & Two Pointers
phases.subtitle: Breadth-first spiral — highest-frequency patterns first.
phases.goal: The highest-frequency patterns in interviews: hash for O(1) lookups, two indices to collapse O(n²) scans, and a first taste of windows.

phases.title: Stack & Binary Search
phases.goal: LIFO thinking (monotonic stacks, spans) and halving the search space in O(log n).

phases.title: Linked Lists & Trees
phases.goal: Pointer surgery on lists, and recursion on binary trees — DFS/BFS, BST invariants.

phases.title: Backtracking & Heaps
phases.goal: Systematic search of all choices (subsets/permutations), and top-k / streaming with a priority queue.

phases.title: Graphs & Advanced Graphs
phases.goal: Grid/adjacency traversal, topological order, union-find, then shortest-path (Dijkstra) and MST.

phases.title: Dynamic Programming
phases.goal: The big one: 1-D take/skip and subsequence DP, then 2-D grid/string DP. Decompose into subproblems.

phases.title: Greedy & Intervals
phases.goal: Locally-optimal choices that prove globally optimal, and the sort-then-sweep interval toolkit.

phases.title: Tries, Math & Bit Manipulation
phases.goal: Prefix trees for word problems, matrix/number geometry, and bit tricks.

patterns.name: Two Pointers
patterns.tagline: Two indices sweeping a sorted/bounded array.

patterns.name: Sliding Window
patterns.tagline: A moving range over contiguous elements.

patterns.name: Stack
patterns.tagline: LIFO — last in, first out. Great for matching and spans.

patterns.name: Binary Search
patterns.tagline: Halve the search space each step — O(log n).

patterns.name: Linked List
patterns.tagline: Pointer surgery: reverse, merge, detect cycles.

patterns.name: Trees
patterns.tagline: Recursion on binary trees — DFS, BFS, BST invariants.

patterns.name: Backtracking
patterns.tagline: Try a choice, recurse, undo it — explore all possibilities.

patterns.name: Heap / Priority Queue
patterns.tagline: Always pull the min/max in O(log n) — top-k and streaming.

patterns.name: Graphs
patterns.tagline: Grid & adjacency traversal, topo sort, union-find.

patterns.name: Greedy
patterns.tagline: Locally-optimal choices that are provably globally optimal.

patterns.name: Intervals
patterns.tagline: Sort by start/end, then sweep and merge.

patterns.name: Tries
patterns.tagline: Prefix trees — anything about words → prefixes.
